example_queries.title: Query patients with multiple chronic conditions
example_queries.description: Find patients with both diabetes and hypertension for specialized care program

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE ARRAY_CONTAINS(c.chronicConditions, 'Diabetes') AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(c.chronicConditions, 'Hypertension')

example_queries.title: Find recently admitted patients
example_queries.description: List patients with visits in the last 30 days

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.lastVisitDate >= '2025-12-06' ORDER BY c.lastVisitDate DESC

messages.content: You are a medical assistant. Summarize patient records concisely.
Summarize the medical history for patient with diabetes, hypertension, and recent cardiac event.
